items.name: 川前神楽
items.subcategory: 市指定無形民俗文化財
items.description: 岩手山神社の神楽として川前地区に伝わる山伏神楽。篠木神楽と同系統でそこから分かれたとされる。保存団体: 川前神楽保存会。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated intangible folk cultural property, a kagura ritual dance. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 10 December 1977. It is located in the Kawamae district of Takizawa City.

items.name: 滝沢駒踊り
items.subcategory: 市指定無形民俗文化財
items.description: 放牧中の馬の動作を表現した踊り。大野村から大正期に外山牧場を経て伝来。保存団体: 滝沢駒踊り保存会。同じ告示ページ(contents-13253)で大沢田植踊りと併載。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated intangible folk cultural property, a horse dance. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 19 June 1984. It is located in the Kawamae district of Takizawa City.

items.name: 大沢田植踊り
items.subcategory: 市指定無形民俗文化財
items.description: 稲の豊穣を祈る予祝芸能で小正月を中心に踊られる。約300年前に上鵜飼から伝来と口承。指定年月日はページに個別記載なし(滝沢駒踊りと同ページ contents-13253 に併載、駒踊りは昭和59年6月19日)。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated intangible folk cultural property, a rice-planting dance. It is designated by Takizawa City. It is located in the Osawa district of Takizawa City.

items.name: 餓死供養塔
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 南部藩の飢饉犠牲者供養のため建立された供養塔群(安政2年・文化12年・寛政12年・天保3年建立の計4基)。所有者: 滝沢市。原表記は「昭和42年3月1日村指定」(旧滝沢村時代)。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated historic site, a memorial tower for famine victims. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 1 March 1967. It is located at 367 Ukai Kitsunebora, Takizawa City.

items.name: 追分けの碑
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 鹿角街道と岩手山参道(柳沢口)の分岐に立つ道標。安政3年建立・文化4年建立の追分け石。所有者: 岩手山神社。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated historic site, a road-fork monument. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 1 October 1979. It is located near 180 Sukogo, Takizawa City.

items.name: 鹿角街道・菊塚一里塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 鹿角街道3番目の一里塚。塚径約6m、高さ1.5mでほぼ原型を保つ。市内に残る鹿角街道一里塚のうち唯一明確なもの。所有者: 家畜改良センター岩手牧場。

en.name_en: Kikuzuka Milestone Mound on the Kazuno Highway
en.description_en: This is a municipally designated historic site, an ichirizuka milestone mound on the Kazuno Highway. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 28 May 1981. It is located within the Sukogo area of Takizawa City.

items.name: 田村神社のスギ・カツラ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 滝沢市篠木上篠木12番地
items.description: 樹齢1,000年以上のスギ(令和7年に空洞化で整備)と樹齢500年以上のカツラ。所有者: 田村神社。

en.name_en: Cedar and Katsura of Tamura Shrine
en.description_en: This is a municipally designated natural monument, a cedar and a katsura tree. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 1 March 1967. It is located at 12 Shinoki Kami-Shinoki, Takizawa City.

items.name: 角掛神社の五龍のフジ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 樹齢約200〜300年のフジの老大樹5本。5頭の龍が舞い上がる姿に見えることから命名。所有者: 角掛神社。

en.name_romaji: Tsunokake Jinja no Goryū no Fuji
en.description_en: This is a municipally designated natural monument, the five-dragon wisteria. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 2 October 1978. It is located at 34 Yubunezawa, Takizawa City.

items.name: 山神神社のスギ・クリ・ベニイタヤ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 滝沢市鵜飼姥屋敷30の1の内の3
items.description: 樹齢約600年のスギ、約300年のクリ、約300年のベニイタヤ。姥屋敷地区のシンボル。所有者: 山神神社。

en.name_romaji: Yamagami Jinja no Sugi Kuri Beniitaya
en.name_en: Cedar, Chestnut and Red Maple of Yamagami Shrine
en.description_en: This is a municipally designated natural monument, comprising a cedar, chestnut and red maple. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 18 April 1979. It is located at Ukai Ubayashiki 30-1 (within 3), Takizawa City.

items.name: チョウセンアカシジミ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.subcategory: 市指定天然記念物(昆虫)
items.description: 朝鮮半島原産のシジミチョウ科の小型の蝶。国内では新潟・山形・岩手の限られた地域のみに生息する「幻の蝶」。食樹はトネリコ。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated natural monument in the insect category, the Korean hairstreak butterfly. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 30 June 1987. It is located at Sukogo, Takizawa City.

items.name: 八幡館山遺跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 八幡館山山頂の城館跡。11世紀後半の安倍氏時代の山城跡と推定、戦国時代16世紀後半にも再利用。指定面積87,636平方メートル。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated historic site, an archaeological site. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 29 March 2010. It is located at Okama Hakusan 50-21 and elsewhere, Takizawa City.

items.name: 大釜館遺跡7号溝出土土器19点
items.subcategory: 市指定有形文化財(考古資料)
items.location: 滝沢市湯舟沢327-13(滝沢市埋蔵文化財センター)
items.description: 大釜館遺跡7号溝跡から出土した平安時代末期(11世紀後半)の土器19点(内黒土師器高台埦1点、埦17点、小皿1点)。所有者: 滝沢市教育委員会。

en.name_romaji: Ōkamadate Iseki Nanagō Mizo Shutsudo Doki Jūkyū Ten
en.name_en: Nineteen Vessels Excavated from Ditch No. 7 at the Okamadate Site
en.description_en: This is a municipally designated tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, nineteen earthenware vessels. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 29 March 2010. It is held at the Takizawa City Buried Cultural Property Center, 327-13 Yubunezawa.

items.name: 足形付土版1点
items.subcategory: 市指定有形文化財(考古資料)
items.location: 滝沢市湯舟沢327-13(滝沢市埋蔵文化財センター)
items.description: 歩行直前の幼児の左足形がついた縄文時代後期前葉(約4千年前)の粘土焼物。岩手県内初の出土例(昭和57年)。所有者: 滝沢市教育委員会。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a footprint-impressed clay tablet. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 30 July 2013. It is held at the Takizawa City Buried Cultural Property Center, 327-13 Yubunezawa.

items.name: 人体文付深鉢1点
items.subcategory: 市指定有形文化財(考古資料)
items.location: 滝沢市湯舟沢327-13(滝沢市埋蔵文化財センター)
items.description: 人体文が付けられた縄文時代後期前葉(約4千年前)の縄文土器の深鉢。器高45.0cm(復元値)。所有者: 滝沢市教育委員会。

en.name_en: Deep Bowl with Human-Figure Design (One Piece)
en.description_en: This is a municipally designated tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a deep bowl with a human-figure design. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 30 July 2013. It is held at the Takizawa City Buried Cultural Property Center, 327-13 Yubunezawa.

items.name: 滝沢市さんさ踊り
items.subcategory: 市指定無形民俗文化財
items.description: 鵜飼地区に伝承された伝統さんさ踊り。昭和54年に保存会発足。9演目を継承。保存団体: 滝沢市さんさ踊り保存会。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated intangible folk cultural property, the Sansa dance. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 27 February 2023. It is located in the Ukai district of Takizawa City.

items.name: 大沢さんさ踊り
items.subcategory: 市指定無形民俗文化財
items.description: 大沢地区に伝承されたさんさ踊り。初見記録は大正10年。「大沢一番」等の地域独自の舞を持つ。保存団体: 大沢さんさ踊り保存会。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated intangible folk cultural property, the Sansa dance. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 27 February 2023. It is located in the Osawa district of Takizawa City.

items.name: カワシンジュガイ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: イシガイ目カワシンジュガイ科の二枚貝。環境省レッドリスト絶滅危惧IB類。幼生がサクラマスに寄生、寿命100年程度。

en.description_en: This is a municipally designated natural monument, the freshwater pearl mussel. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 27 February 2023. It is found in rivers within Takizawa City.
